title: collinsia torreyi var. linearis
intro: Collinsia torreyi var. linearis, also known as Torrey's bluebell or linear-leaved bluebell, is a variety of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Collinsia torreyi var. linearis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, Collinsia torreyi var. linearis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in capsules or powders.
